mdtools.failure_summary: The mdtools-only run reached the turn cap and produced a structurally duplicated result: the target heading appeared twice around the destination and also remained under Maintenance, so both scorers reported heading_tree, block_order, and block_text mismatches.

hybrid.success_summary: The hybrid run completed the subsection relocation with dual-scorer agreement.

unix.success_summary: The unix run completed the same relocation with dual-scorer agreement after a slower multi-mutation strategy.

notes: The candidate is realistic and hybrid succeeded, but unix also succeeded, so there is no positive hybrid-minus-unix headline gap.
The mdtools-only failure is informative but not promotable evidence for T10 because the promotion gate requires at least one mdtools win and a positive, AST-structural hybrid-minus-unix gap.
